title: Infusion pump alarm doesn't trigger
description: The occlusion alarm on the infusion pump display doesn't sound when the IV line is blocked. We tested with a clamp on the line and the alarm LED stayed green. No audio alert.

title: Dosage calculator shows wrong result
description: When entering patient weight as 72.5kg and drug concentration 250mg/500ml, the calculator shows 18.1 ml/hr instead of the correct 14.5 ml/hr. Reproduced 3 times.

title: Audit log missing entries after crash
description: After a system restart following a power cut, the last 47 audit log entries are missing. The timestamps jump from 14:22 to 15:09 with no records in between.

title: Patient ID field accepts special characters
description: The patient ID input field accepts SQL injection strings like ' OR 1=1 -- without validation. Should only allow alphanumeric and dash.

title: Vital signs graph freezes at 30 min
description: The real-time vital signs monitoring graph stops updating after approximately 30 minutes of continuous display. The page needs a manual refresh. Happens on all browsers.

title: Electronic signature not validated on discharge form
description: Doctor can submit the patient discharge form without providing a valid PIN for electronic signature. The form just warns but still submits.

title: DICOM image loads in wrong orientation
description: Chest X-ray DICOM files uploaded from the new Siemens scanner display rotated 90 degrees clockwise. Images from the older Philips scanner display correctly.

title: Medication reconciliation duplicates entries
description: When a nurse confirms medication reconciliation after a ward transfer, existing medication entries are duplicated in the record. Patient now shows 2x metformin 500mg.

title: Session timeout not enforced on shared workstation
description: The 15-minute idle session timeout does not trigger on the ward workstations. Nurses are finding previous clinicians' sessions still active after breaks exceeding 30 minutes.

title: CSV export of patient reports contains raw HTML
description:
Exporting patient summary reports to CSV includes raw HTML tags like and
in the text fields. Third-party analytics tool cannot parse the file.

title: 2FA code accepted after expiry
description: A TOTP code generated 4 minutes ago was still accepted for login even though codes should expire after 30 seconds. Tested with a deliberately delayed code.

title: Wire transfer amount field allows negative values
description: Entering -500 in the wire transfer amount field processes as a credit of 500 to the sender account instead of rejecting the input. Tested on staging.

title: Transaction history pagination skips records
description: When navigating to page 3 of transaction history (25 per page), records 51-75 are skipped and page 3 shows the same records as page 2. Affects accounts with 200+ transactions.

title: Currency conversion rate not updated during market hours
description: The EUR/GBP exchange rate displayed in the transfer form shows yesterday's closing rate during London market hours instead of the live rate. 40-minute lag observed.

title: PDF statement generation crashes for accounts over 5 years
description: Requesting a PDF statement for accounts older than 5 years causes a 502 error. The request times out after 30 seconds. Accounts under 5 years work correctly.

title: Beneficiary IBAN validation accepts invalid checksums
description: The beneficiary IBAN input field accepts IBANs with invalid MOD-97 checksums without displaying an error. Invalid transfers are then rejected by the downstream bank with a fee.

title: Push notification for large transaction not sent
description: Transactions over 10,000 EUR should trigger an immediate push notification per PSD2 requirements. Three test transactions of 15,000 EUR produced no notification within 10 minutes.

title: Loan calculator ignores compound interest after month 12
description: The loan repayment calculator produces correct results for months 1-12 but from month 13 it calculates simple interest instead of compound. 8% difference on a 36-month loan.

title: Account freeze does not block outgoing API transfers
description: When an account is flagged and frozen via the compliance dashboard, the REST API still processes outgoing transfer requests for that account. The freeze only blocks UI transfers.

title: Login session persists after password change
description: After a user changes their password, all existing sessions on other devices remain valid and active. Sessions should be invalidated immediately on password change.

title: Button doesn't work
description: The submit button on the checkout page doesn't do anything when I click it. I tried refreshing.

title: Page crashes
description: The dashboard crashes when I open it. Error appears then disappears. Using Chrome on Windows.

title: Search not working
description: Search results are wrong. I searched for 'laptop' and got results for 'table'. This happens sometimes but not always.

title: Email not sent after registration
description: After creating a new account, the confirmation email is not delivered. Checked spam folder. Tried 3 different email addresses. Issue started yesterday afternoon.

title: File upload fails for large files
description: Uploading files larger than approximately 50MB fails with no error message. The progress bar reaches 100% then the page reloads. Small files work fine.

title: Dark mode toggle resets on page reload
description: When dark mode is enabled and the page is reloaded or navigated away from, the setting reverts to light mode. The preference is not persisted across sessions.

title: Autocomplete suggestions appear behind modal
description: When filling out the address field inside a modal dialog, the autocomplete dropdown suggestions appear behind the modal overlay and are not clickable.

title: Date picker blocks past date selection for edits
description: When editing an existing event created in the past, the date picker prevents selecting any past date. This makes it impossible to correct the date of historical records.

title: Table sorting breaks after filter applied
description: Applying a column filter then clicking a column header to sort results in the wrong order. The sort appears to operate on the pre-filter dataset.

title: Mobile layout overlaps footer on small screens
description: On devices with screen width below 375px (e.g. iPhone SE), the main content area overlaps the fixed footer. Buttons in the footer are partially hidden by the content.
